title: America's Founding Symbols
description: A simple coloring page featuring key American symbols that represent freedom and democracy, designed to introduce young students to foundational American values.
instructions: Color each part of the image using your favorite colors. As you color, think about what each symbol means for our country.

content.image: A collection of simple American founding symbols including the Liberty Bell, American flag, bald eagle, and Constitution document with 'We the People' visible at the top.

elements.name: Liberty Bell
elements.description: The bell that rang to announce the reading of the Declaration of Independence

elements.name: American Flag
elements.description: Our nation's flag with stars and stripes

elements.name: Constitution
elements.description: The document that contains our country's rules

learningFacts: The Liberty Bell has a famous crack in it.
The American flag has 50 stars for 50 states.
The Constitution begins with the words 'We the People.'
The bald eagle became America's national symbol in 1782.
